query:
-- Show the unmatched services with real addresses
SELECT externalId, serviceType, supplierName, locationAddress, customerName, supplierAccount
FROM services
WHERE (customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '')
  AND locationAddress IS NOT NULL AND locationAddress != ''
  AND locationAddress NOT LIKE '%Unknown%';
